description: Letter addressed to Shelomo Ḥalafta Yerushalmi and Meir Ashkenazi, concerning business, the commodity saffron (זעפראן)" is mentioned. R. Yiṣḥaq Luria (ha-Ari) was a part of this business as well. (Information from David Avraham, Alei Sefer 14, 1987, p. 135, and David Avraham, “The Role of Egyptian Jews in Sixteenth-century International Trade with Europe,” in From a Sacred Source: Genizah Studies in Honour of Professor Stefan C. Reif,” 106 ). VMR and EMS Verso: Jottings of names and accounts, mentioning Rašīd and Nissim Sason. C. 15th-17th century. (Information from CUDL)
tags: trade, business, Shelomo Halafta, Isaac Luria
description_he: מכתב לשלמה חלפתא הירושלמי ומאיר האשכנזי בנושא עסקים: מוזכר זעפראן. ר' יצחק לוריא (האר"י) שותף בעסקה. על הגב: שמות וחשבונות, מוזכרים רשיד ונסים ששון. כ-המאות ה-15–17.
